lessons: Ensure consistent logic is applied to all claims when handling stacked cells. The logic for summing stacked 'contractual_adjustments' was applied correctly to the third claim but not to the second claim.

Extract data exactly as it appears in the source text, even if it contains apparent typos (e.g., '00-45' instead of 'CO-45', 'MPS' instead of 'MIPS'). Post-processing steps can be used for normalization or correction if needed.
Ensure that stacked monetary values for a single service line are consistently summed, as was done for the third claim but not for the second.
The text in definition tables (like ADJUSTMENT REASON CODES) should be extracted verbatim, even if it appears to contradict codes used in the service lines.
